location.office_time_required: occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager

level_signals: 12+ years of program management experience in technology companies
Comp range $156K–$193K base consistent with Staff IC at Airbnb
Strategic influence across executives and cross-functional org

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 12+ years of program management experience in technology companies, with a proven track record of delivering complex, cross-functional programs on time and within scope
Deep expertise in program and change management methodologies for mid- to large-scale initiatives
Leverages industry-standard project management tools to drive efficiency and transparency
Exceptional listener who synthesizes complex discussions into clear, actionable insights
Translates technical concepts and strategic priorities into concise written communication tailored to diverse audiences—from engineering and data science to executive leadership
Builds trust and secures buy-in across multiple teams and levels of the organization
Fluent in the languages of engineering, product, data science, and business operations
Thrives in undefined problem spaces, bringing structure and clarity to ambiguous situations
Identifies patterns and creates frameworks where none exist, enabling teams to move forward confidently

scope.surface: Tech-wide programs and initiatives across Airbnb's Tech Operations and Programs team
core_responsibilities: Lead strategic tech wide programs and initiatives that drive operational excellence and efficiency across the organization
Own end-to-end program delivery—from planning and scoping through execution and impact measurement
Partner with leadership and cross-functional teams to ensure seamless execution of complex, multi-stakeholder initiatives
Drive alignment across teams to ensure coordinated effort toward shared goals
Facilitate regular and ad hoc leadership meetings, synthesizing discussions into clear action items, ownership, and timelines
Communicate program strategy, progress, and impact to stakeholders at all levels—from executives to individual contributors
Provide regular updates, solicit feedback, and proactively address blockers to maintain momentum
Translate strategic objectives into clear, actionable plans that align teams and drive accountability

compensation.equity_form: eligible for bonus, equity, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits

green_flags: US Remote Eligible — broad geographic flexibility
Clear ownership of end-to-end program delivery
Bonus, equity, and Employee Travel Credits mentioned
Encourages applications from all qualified individuals including those with disabilities
red_flags: Must live in a state where Airbnb has a registered entity — some states excluded, narrowing remote eligibility
No specific tools named, making it hard to assess tooling expectations
No nice-to-haves listed — ambiguous what differentiates candidates
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not explicitly addressed

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Staff', years requirement, and comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated)
location.work_auth (inferred from US-state eligibility restriction language; no explicit sponsorship statement)
ambiguities: Work authorization and visa sponsorship not explicitly addressed in the JD; 'no-sponsorship' inferred from US-state registration constraint but not confirmed.
Nice-to-haves section is entirely absent — all requirements treated as must-haves. There may be unstated preferences.
Specific project management tools are not named; 'industry-standard project management tools' is intentionally vague.
